system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tinhgia_congdoan2","body":"



CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TINHGIA_CONGDOAN2]
(
	@tungay date,
	@denngay date,
	@type nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN
--DECLARE @tungay date = '2024-10-19' 
--DECLARE @denngay date = '2024-10-19'
--DECLARE @type nvarchar(50) = 'CHITIET'
DECLARE @BOPHAN TABLE
(
    khuvuc nvarchar(50),
    bophan_sx nvarchar(50),
    bophan_ns nvarchar(50),
    tenbophan nvarchar(200)
)

INSERT INTO @BOPHAN (khuvuc, bophan_sx, bophan_ns, tenbophan)
VALUES (N'PHOI', N'DP01', N'BRC', N'Bào - Rong - Cắt'),
        (N'PHOI', N'DP02', N'B4M', N'Bào 4 mặt - Nhám thùng'),
        (N'PHOI', N'DP04', N'B4M', N'Bào 4 mặt - Nhám thùng'),
        (N'PHOI', N'DP03', N'CAO', N'Cảo - Ghép - Ke bọ'),
        (N'PHOI', N'DP05', N'CAO', N'Cảo - Ghép - Ke bọ'),
        (N'DINHHINH1', N'DH06', N'DHMC', N'Định hình 1'),
        (N'DINHHINH2', N'DH07', N'DH2D', N'Định hình 2')


SELECT B.khuvuc, A.ngaythang, A.bophan, A.tenbophan, A.tongtien
INTO #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN
FROM tr_baocao_hiendien3 A
	INNER JOIN @BOPHAN B ON A.bophan = B.bophan_ns
WHERE A.ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
GROUP BY B.khuvuc, A.ngaythang, A.bophan, A.tenbophan, A.tongtien


SELECT A.ngaythang,
		A.khuvuc, A.bophan_ns, A.tenbophan, 
		A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu, 
		met = SUM(A.met), 
		metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong), 
		metkhoi = SUM(A.metkhoi),
		dongia_met = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_met), 
		dongia_metvuong = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_metvuong), 
		dongia_metkhoi = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_metkhoi),
		thanhtien_met = SUM(A.met * B.dongia_met), 
		thanhtien_metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong * B.dongia_metvuong),
		thanhtien_metkhoi = SUM(A.metkhoi * B.dongia_metkhoi)
INTO #THONGKE_SOLUONG
FROM (
	SELECT A.ngaythang,
		B.khuvuc, B.bophan_sx, B.bophan_ns, B.tenbophan,
		A.nguyenlieu, C.id AS id_nguyenlieu, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.soluong,
		met = (A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000,
		metvuong = (A.rong * A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000000,
		metkhoi = (A.dayy * A.rong * A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000000000
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
		INNER JOIN @BOPHAN B ON A.congdoan = CONCAT(B.bophan_sx, '-PROD')
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva C ON A.nguyenlieu = C.nguyenlieu
	WHERE A.ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
) A LEFT JOIN tr_dinhbien_nguyenlieu B ON A.id_nguyenlieu = B.id_nguyenlieu AND A.bophan_sx = B.bophan
GROUP BY A.ngaythang, A.khuvuc, A.bophan_ns, A.tenbophan, A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu


IF @type = 'CHITIET'
BEGIN
	SELECT A.ngaythang, 
		A.bophan_ns, 
		A.tenbophan, 
		A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu,
		dongia_met, dongia_metvuong, dongia_metkhoi,
		met, metvuong, metkhoi,
		thanhtien_met, thanhtien_metvuong, thanhtien_metkhoi,
		B.tongtien
	FROM #THONGKE_SOLUONG A
		LEFT JOIN #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN B ON A.bophan_ns = B.bophan AND A.ngaythang = B.ngaythang
END
ELSE
BEGIN

	SELECT A.ngaythang, 
		A.khuvuc AS bophan_ns,
		CASE
			WHEN A.khuvuc = 'PHOI' THEN N'Phôi'
			WHEN A.khuvuc = 'DINHHINH1' THEN N'Định hình 1'
			WHEN A.khuvuc = 'DINHHINH2' THEN N'Định hình 2'
		END AS tenbophan,
		A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu,
		A.dongia_met, A.dongia_metvuong, A.dongia_metkhoi,
		A.met, A.metvuong, A.metkhoi,
		A.thanhtien_met, A.thanhtien_metvuong, A.thanhtien_metkhoi,
		B.tongtien
	FROM (
		SELECT A.ngaythang, 
			A.khuvuc, 
			A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu,
			0 dongia_met, 
			0 dongia_metvuong, 
			0 dongia_metkhoi,
			met = SUM(met),
			metvuong = SUM(metvuong),
			metkhoi = SUM(metkhoi),
			thanhtien_met = SUM(thanhtien_met), 
			thanhtien_metvuong = SUM(thanhtien_metvuong), 
			thanhtien_metkhoi = SUM(thanhtien_metkhoi)
			--tongtien = SUM(B.tongtien) OVER(PARTITION BY khuvuc)
		FROM #THONGKE_SOLUONG A
			LEFT JOIN @BOPHAN B ON A.bophan_ns = B.bophan_ns
		GROUP BY A.ngaythang, A.khuvuc, A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu
	) A LEFT JOIN (SELECT ngaythang, khuvuc, SUM(tongtien) AS tongtien FROM #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN GROUP BY ngaythang, khuvuc) B ON A.khuvuc = B.khuvuc AND A.ngaythang = B.ngaythang
END
DROP TABLE #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN, #THONGKE_SOLUONG
END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_baocao_hiendien3","dbo.tr_dinhbien_nguyenlieu","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
